summary: Implementation review accepts runtime blocker, evidence status, retention/freshness, and smoke changes as bounded Stage 5 Harbor refs/status facts.
reviewed_validation_summary: pnpm typecheck; pnpm test; pnpm smoke:runtime; git diff --check passed locally on HARBOR-126.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The change exposes Harbor-owned refs/status facts without raw runtime material, hosted browser scope, or App/Core/Lode truth duplication.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Typecheck, tests, smoke, and diff checks cover runtime blockers, evidence status, stale/expired states, and raw/private material exclusion.
